report.summary: Drafted 6 social posts (#110-115 incl. Day 48 Fear Record, Morgan Stanley MSBT 3-part thread, 20M BTC supply milestone, onchain credit scores, CLARITY Act, tax countdown) + newsletter v23 + Discord/TG update + 3 SVG social cards + content calendar v28 (7 posts through Mar 27). Top narratives: record 48-day Extreme Fear streak, Morgan Stanley spot BTC ETF filing, 20M BTC supply milestone, CLARITY Act stablecoin yield resolution.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #110: Day 48 Extreme Fear — record streak surpassing FTX-era 42 days, contrasted with institutional accumulation (scheduled Wed Mar 25 11AM ET)
Tweet #111: Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF Thread (3 parts) — first major US bank spot BTC ETF, $1.5T wealth management, 15K advisors, timeline from skeptics to issuers (scheduled Wed Mar 25 3PM ET)
Tweet #112: 20 Million BTC Supply Milestone — only 1M left to mine over 114 years, 95.24% mined, institutional accumulation context (scheduled Thu Mar 26 10AM ET)
Tweet #113: Onchain Credit Scoring — DeFi's $12T undercollateralized lending opportunity, Credora/Spectral/Cred Protocol (scheduled Thu Mar 26 3PM ET)
Tweet #114: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 99% resolved — $304B stablecoin supply implications (scheduled Fri Mar 27 9AM ET)
Tweet #115: Tax Season 21-Day Countdown — IRS obligations for swaps, NFTs, airdrops, staking (scheduled Fri Mar 27 2PM ET)
Newsletter v23: 'Morgan Stanley Wants Its Own Bitcoin ETF. Day 48 of Fear.' — covers MSBT filing, fear record, 20M BTC milestone, CLARITY Act, 4 new degen0x guides
Discord/Telegram Wednesday update with market data, MSBT news, and 4 new guide announcements
Content calendar v28: 7 posts scheduled Wed Mar 25 through Fri Mar 27

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Day 48 Extreme Fear Record — fear gauge visualization with data cards (F&G=8, $2.5B ETF inflows, MS filed ETF)
SVG social card: Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF — bank icon, ticker/exchange/custodian/AUM data cards, adoption timeline
SVG social card: 20M BTC Supply Milestone — large number display, 95.24% supply bar, MicroStrategy/ETF/halving stats

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: HIGHEST GROWTH: Fear & Greed content — 48-day record streak is unprecedented in 2026. Every day the streak continues generates fresh search interest. This is our #1 narrative advantage.
STRONG GROWTH: Bitcoin ETF coverage — Morgan Stanley MSBT filing adds a new wave of 'morgan stanley bitcoin etf' queries. Combined with $2.5B March inflows, ETF content is peaking.
EMERGING: Onchain credit scoring, ERC-8183 agentic commerce — early-mover content on topics with no competition. These will compound over weeks.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 21 days until April 15 deadline. Search volume peaks in final 2 weeks. Maximum urgency for promotion.
STEADY: Tools (DCA calculator, staking APY, gas tracker) — evergreen traffic anchors. Consistent but not growing fast.
BLOCKED: 160+ pages stuck behind git lock (Day 9). All growth trajectory estimates assume eventual deployment. Every day undeployed = lost indexing momentum for 501 promoted slugs.
